attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.TXN_SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.TXN_SOURCE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.INSPECTION_STATUS, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.PICK_METHODOLOGY_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.CONTAINER_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.CARTON_GROUPING_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.MODEL_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.CROSSDOCK_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.REQUIRED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.GRADE_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.SECONDARY_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_DELIVERED, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_DETAILED, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.SECONDARY_REQUIRED_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.WIP_ENTITY_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.WIP_SUPPLY_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES,
 (
 select LINE_ID ,HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES
 minus
 select LINE_ID ,HEADER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LINE_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.LINE_ID and ACM.HEADER_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_TXN_REQUEST_LINES)
